#+TITLE: toc.nvim org demo

* Introduction
Org files are indexed by heading depth: one star per level.

** Motivation
Why an outline helps while editing long notes.

** Goals
- keep the outline in sync with the cursor
- jump anywhere with a keypress

* Usage
*** TODO Write the getting-started guide
*** DONE Wire up the default keymap

** Configuration
#+BEGIN_SRC lua
require("toc").setup {
  preset = "compact",
}
#+END_SRC

See [[https://github.com/zerochae/toc.nvim][the repository]] for the full option list.

* Reference :docs:internal:
Trailing tags and TODO keywords are stripped from the panel.
